name: Enterprise Knowledge Onboarding Platform
description: An AI-powered knowledge management and employee onboarding system for a mid-size fintech company (Meridian Financial). The platform ingests corporate documents — architecture decision records, API style guides, employee handbooks, security policies, deployment runbooks, engineering RFCs, and product documentation — and makes them searchable through a conversational AI interface. New hires interact with the system to rapidly onboard without reading hundreds of pages of documentation. The system extracts entities, builds a knowledge graph of relationships between people, teams, services, and policies, and provides grounded answers with source citations.
tech_stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, React, Amazon Bedrock, Amazon OpenSearch
user_stories: As a new hire, I want to ask questions about company policies and engineering practices in natural language so that I can get accurate answers without reading through hundreds of pages of documentation
As a new hire, I want every answer to include citations linking back to the specific source document and section so that I can verify the information and read more context if needed
As an engineering manager, I want to upload PDF and Markdown documents to the platform so that my team's institutional knowledge becomes searchable by the AI assistant

As an engineering manager, I want the system to automatically extract key entities from uploaded documents — people, teams, services, technologies, policies — so that I can see what knowledge the system has ingested

As a new hire, I want to ask 'Who owns the payments service?' or 'Who should I talk to about API design?' and get answers based on the ingested documentation so that I can navigate the organization quickly

As an administrator, I want to see a dashboard showing all ingested documents, their processing status, entity counts, and last-updated timestamps so that I can monitor the health of the knowledge base
As a new hire, I want to ask follow-up questions in a conversation thread so that the AI remembers context from my previous questions and gives more relevant answers

As an engineering manager, I want the system to detect when uploaded documents contain conflicting information (e.g., two documents describe different deployment processes) and flag these conflicts for resolution

As an administrator, I want to organize documents into collections (e.g., 'Engineering Standards', 'HR Policies', 'Product Documentation') so that the AI can scope its answers to relevant collections when appropriate
As a new hire, I want to see a visual knowledge graph showing how teams, services, and people are connected so that I can understand the organizational structure at a glance

As an engineering manager, I want to receive weekly digest emails summarizing what new documents were added, what questions new hires are asking most frequently, and what knowledge gaps exist (questions that couldn't be answered) so that I can prioritize documentation efforts

As a new hire, I want the system to suggest a personalized onboarding checklist based on my role (e.g., backend engineer, frontend engineer, data scientist) and track my progress through recommended reading and learning milestones
